calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: V3 Full Integration Benchmark
items.notes: Full-stack V3 integration benchmark. All components active: E1+E2+E3+Hippocampus+ResidueField+MultiRateClock+ThetaBuffer+BetaGate+SD-005/010/011. P1=terrain(500ep random), P2=E3-cal(300ep stratified), P3=agent-eval(150ep full loop), P4=edge-cases(4x50ep). Tests: SD-005 self-other boundary, E3 harm avoidance, MECH-094 residue gate, MECH-090 beta gate, SD-006 multi-rate clock.
